name: Jane Doe
history: Recent divorce and financial difficulties. Relationship since age 19. Has a young son and is settling child support issues. Adjusting to being alone and handling new experiences (e.g., traveling alone with her son, visiting family without a partner).
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be abandoned
intermediate_belief: I must maintain relationships at all costs to avoid being alone.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I am not included or wanted, it means I am not worthy.
coping_strategies: Seeks validation and advice from others to avoid making decisions alone.
situation: Received an email from the ex-partner refusing to agree on child support and financial arrangements.
auto_thought: I can't handle this alone; I'm going to be left without support.
behavior: Seeks reassurance from others and avoids confrontation.
